title: Eric Gadd
compiled_truth: Eric Gadd is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2002-03-22), Eric Gadd sent 109 and received 501 emails, totalling 610 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kevin Hyatt](people/kevin-hyatt) (58), [Danny Mccarty](people/danny-mccarty) (40), [Susan Wadle](people/susan-wadle) (14), [Drew Fossum](people/drew-fossum) (12), [Robert Hill](people/robert-hill) (10).
